footer.disclaimer: VisaForge is not a law firm. We do not provide legal advice.

home.title: VisaForge — Self-file your US visa with AI guidance
home.description: EB-2 NIW, O-1A, EB-1A and more. Templates, checklists, AI assistant. For ambitious individuals filing themselves.

hero.heading: Self-file your US visa with AI guidance
hero.subheading: EB-2 NIW, O-1A, EB-1A and more — templates, checklists, AI assistant. Built for individuals, not corporations.
hero.trustLine: We never give legal advice. We help you prepare your own petition.

problem.heading: Why this exists
problem.intro: Immigration lawyers charge $5,000 to $15,000 or more. Existing platforms target corporations. Nothing exists for ambitious individuals filing themselves.

bullets.cost: Attorney fees are prohibitive for early-career applicants
bullets.tools: Tools like Alma and Boundless serve HR teams, not individuals
bullets.diy: Self-filers face USCIS forms with no guidance and no feedback

howItWorks.heading: How it works

quiz.title: 1. Take the quiz
quiz.body: Five minutes — personalized visa path recommendation.

templates.title: 2. Use templates
templates.body: Petition letters, business plans, recommendation letter samples.

ai.title: 3. AI assistant
ai.body: Answers 24/7. Reviews your drafts. Suggests improvements.

howItWorks.disclaimerBanner: AI guidance is information, not legal advice.

visaTypes.heading: Visas we focus on

eb2niw.name: EB-2 NIW
eb2niw.desc: National Interest Waiver. For applicants whose work benefits the United States.

o1a.name: O-1A
o1a.desc: Extraordinary ability in sciences, business, education, athletics.

eb1a.name: EB-1A
eb1a.desc: Extraordinary ability — the highest skill category for green card.

visaTypes.alsoSupported: H-1B · L-1 · E-2 · F-1 / OPT → H-1B transition
visaTypes.asylumNote: Asylum guidance is paused due to current US policy.

pricing.heading: Pricing
